tools.name: pools.replicapoolPoolsGet
tools.description: Gets information about a single replica pool.

tools.name: pools.replicapoolPoolsResize
tools.description: Resize a pool. This is an asynchronous operation, and multiple overlapping resize requests can be made. Replica Pools will use the information from the last resize request.

tools.name: pools.replicapoolPoolsUpdatetemplate
tools.description: Update the template used by the pool.

tools.name: replicas.replicapoolReplicasDelete
tools.description: Deletes a replica from the pool.

tools.name: replicas.replicapoolReplicasGet
tools.description: Gets information about a specific replica.

tools.name: replicas.replicapoolReplicasList
tools.description: Lists all replicas in a pool.

tools.name: replicas.replicapoolReplicasRestart
tools.description: Restarts a replica in a pool.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
